hero.title: Your home, designed for you. Not for everyone.
hero.subtitle: Custom furniture at the price you already pay. Valencia · Spain

utp.label: Why choose us
utp.title: The IKEA price. The piece that only exists in your home.
utp.body: We manufacture to measure in Valencia. No catalogues, no compromises — just your space, your measurements, your style. For the same price you would pay at any big store.

philosophy.label: Our philosophy
philosophy.title: We don't sell furniture. We integrate spaces that last a lifetime.
philosophy.body: Each project starts with active listening and ends with a space that reflects who you are — not who manufactures in series.

services.title: How we work
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final installation
services.step1_desc: Visit, measurements, 3D render of your space
services.step2_desc: Own workshop in Valencia, premium materials

cta.label: Ready to start?
cta.title: Your perfect space starts with a call.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Visit us in Valencia or write to us. We reply within 24h.

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: A team passionate about design and Valencian craftsmanship.
about.history_body: ConceptoFino was born in Valencia with a clear mission: to prove that custom design is not a luxury reserved for a few. With over 15 years of experience and 200+ completed projects, we have transformed hundreds of Valencian homes.

blog.subtitle: Ideas for your home, design trends and news from our workshop.

materials.subtitle: Only the best materials for spaces that last a lifetime.
